subject: An armored knight in ornate plate armor and a tall helm stands holding a halberd or polearm, accompanied by a similarly armored attendant. The pair appear to be tax/tithe collectors of a militant order, posed formally against a fortified backdrop.
description: Two armored figures stand in the foreground of the card art. The forward figure wears full plate armor with engraved or filigreed details and a tall conical helm with a winged or fluted crest; they grip a long polearm vertically. A second armored figure stands slightly behind and to the side, also helmeted and armored. The armor and tabards show pale, washed-out heraldic tones against a darker, muted setting suggesting stone walls or a fortified courtyard. The composition is a mid-shot of the two figures, formal and stiff in posture, evoking a militant clerical or tax-collecting order. Card flavor text reads: 'War or no war, your donations are due, as always.'
foreground: two armored knights in ornate plate with tall helms; lead figure holds a polearm
background: shadowed stone fortification or castle courtyard
